name: Popol and Kupa
intro: Popol and Kupa, the Icefield Companions, are heroes in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: We Are Friends
abilities.description: Buff Popol's good care allows Kupa to recover 10% Max HP per second after not taking damage for 5 seconds. When Kupa is down, Popol can pray for 3 seconds to bring it back to the battlefield. Cooldown : 30 seconds. After launching 3 consecutive attacks on the enemy, Kupa will enhance Popol's next attack , allowing him to deal (+220% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage on hit. Kupa has 2500 (+1200% Total Physical Attack) HP and inherits 100% of Popol's other attributes and equipment effects (excluding those of active, jungling, and roaming equipment). Skill terms Max HP The maximum HP currently can have. Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal. ATK Effect

Kupa can be targeted by hero skills and.Creep-like properties: Kupa receives full damage from Retribution and damage from jungling footwear Unique Passive Hunter. It does not receive shield from Lolita 's Noumenon Energy Core . [ 4 ] Valentina does not gain HP regen nor EXP (with her passive Primal Force ) when dealing damage to Kupa. Minsitthar cannot pull Kupa with Spear of Glory .

abilities.name: Popol's Surprise
abilities.description: Summon CC Popol sets a trap which will detonate after a short delay to the enemy that steps on it, dealing 70–100 (+20% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage , immobilizing it for 1 second, and creating a frost zone for 4 seconds, reducing Movement Speed of enemies within the zone by 20%. Popol can store up to 3 traps at a time and gains 1 charge per 22-16 seconds. Up to 3 traps can be set, each lasting 60 seconds. Skill terms Immobilized A state that prevents a target from moving. The target can't use Blink within the duration. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Energy Charging Time

abilities.name: We Are Angry!
abilities.description: Buff Popol and Kupa enter the Enraged state for 12 seconds: Popol and Kupa both gain 15% extra Movement Speed and increase their Attack Speed to 1.3 times. Kupa turns into the Alpha Wolf Form , gains 1500–3500 HP , and enhances its other skills. Also fully restores its HP . Skill terms ATK Speed It determines the attacking times (capped at 3 times) per second. Total current ATK Speed = Basic ATK Speed + Extra ATK Speed × ATK Speed Coefficient. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).
